purpose: Prevent duplicate answers with a single aggregator, reciprocal deliberation, and no support-bot self-transfer.
hardRules: Only current aggregator may post the final main-chat answer.
Support bot may not self-transfer aggregator ownership.
Support bot may not mark timeout on the aggregator; it may only post a blocker/escalation in Internal Coms.
Once status is answering or answered, no bot may post another substantive main-chat answer for the same request.
Final answer is blocked until required contributors respond or current aggregator posts visible timeout/blocker in Internal Coms.

current.request: Danny reports two consolidated answers and asks why single aggregator enforcement failed

receivedContributions.summary: Opened investigation and requested Hermes input.
Visible timeout: Hermes did not respond to investigation within 75 seconds.

current.rule: Kublai may answer as aggregator after visible Hermes timeout; Hermes must not duplicate.
